name: claude-code
description: Claude Code CLI operations, print-mode automation, diagnostics, plugin and MCP lifecycle, hooks, settings, agents, sessions, and worktrees.

interface.shortDescription: Operate, automate, debug, and inspect Claude Code safely.
interface.longDescription: A Claude Code operations pack for local CLI surface inspection, print-mode automation, plugin marketplace and MCP lifecycle work, safe-mode and bare-mode diagnostics, hooks and settings governance, background agents, sessions, worktrees, remote control, and cloud ultrareview boundaries.
capabilities: Local Claude Code version, help, command, flag, permission-mode, output-format, and safety inspection
Non-interactive claude --print automation with JSON, stream-json, JSON schema, budget, fallback model, prompt stdin, and no-persistence handling
Claude Code plugin marketplace lifecycle, install/update/remove/details/validate/tag/prune, token-cost, and session-only plugin loading
Claude Code MCP server list/get/add/remove/import/serve, project approval, strict config, stdio, HTTP, SSE, headers, env vars, and OAuth workflows
Claude Code diagnostics for safe mode, bare mode, debug logs, doctor, auto-mode classifier, auth, update, install, IDE, and Chrome integration
Claude Code hooks, settings, CLAUDE.md/rules loading, custom agents, tool allow/deny permissions, workflows, and setting-source boundaries
Claude Code background agents, worktrees, tmux panes, resume/continue/from-pr/fork-session, remote control, and ultrareview orchestration
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me operate, automate, or debug Claude Code safely.
